title: Ion mortar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ion mortars''' were weapons equipped to [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] aboard the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]
